trace.input:
SELECT 
    merchant_name, 
    COUNT(transaction_id) AS transaction_count, 
    AVG(amount) AS average_amount
FROM 
    transactions
GROUP BY 
    merchant_name
ORDER BY 
    transaction_count DESC, 
    ABS(average_amount - (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM transactions)) DESC
LIMIT 3;
